title: Present Simple - Be
description: Master the verb 'be' in positive, negative, and question forms. Describe people, feelings, and jobs.
descriptionTr: 'Be' fiilini olumlu, olumsuz ve soru formlarında öğren. İnsanları, duyguları ve meslekleri tanımla.

vocabulary.example: I am happy today because I passed the exam.
vocabulary.extra: Are you happy with your new job?

vocabulary.example: She is sad because her friend moved away.
vocabulary.extra: Don't be sad! Everything will be fine.

vocabulary.example: I am tired after a long day at work.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İşteki uzun bir günden sonra yorgunum.
vocabulary.extra: The children are tired. It's time for bed.

vocabulary.example: Are you hungry? Let's eat something!
vocabulary.exampleTr: Aç mısın? Hadi bir şeyler yiyelim!
vocabulary.extra: I'm always hungry in the morning.

vocabulary.example: I am thirsty. Can I have some water?
vocabulary.extra: After running, I'm always very thirsty.
vocabulary.extraTr: Koşudan sonra hep çok susamış olurum.

vocabulary.example: It is very cold outside today.
vocabulary.extra: I'm cold. Can you close the window?

vocabulary.example: It is so hot in summer!
vocabulary.extra: Be careful, the coffee is very hot.

vocabulary.example: My sister is young. She is only 18.
vocabulary.extra: He's young but very talented.

vocabulary.example: My grandfather is old but very active.
vocabulary.extra: This is an old building. It's 200 years old.

vocabulary.example: He is very tall. He is 190 cm.
vocabulary.extra: The tallest building in the city is 300 meters.

vocabulary.example: The table is too short for me.
vocabulary.extra: She's short but she plays basketball very well.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kısa boylu ama basketbolu çok iyi oynuyor.

vocabulary.example: She is a teacher at an elementary school.
vocabulary.extra: My English teacher is from California.

vocabulary.example: I am a student at Istanbul University.
vocabulary.extra: There are 500 students in our school.

vocabulary.example: My father is a doctor at a hospital.
vocabulary.extra: I need to see a doctor. I'm not feeling well.

vocabulary.example: He is a software engineer at a tech company.
vocabulary.extra: My dream is to be an engineer.

vocabulary.example: Are you ready for the meeting?
vocabulary.extra: Dinner is ready! Come to the table.

vocabulary.example: I am busy right now. Can I call you later?
vocabulary.exampleTr: Şu an meşgulüm. Seni sonra arayabilir miyim?
vocabulary.extra: Monday is always the busiest day.
vocabulary.extraTr: Pazartesi her zaman en yoğun gündür.

vocabulary.example: Sorry, I am late! The traffic was terrible.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Özür dilerim, geç kaldım! Trafik berbattı.
vocabulary.extra: Don't be late for the interview!

vocabulary.example: I am always early for work.
vocabulary.extra: It's too early! The store isn't open yet.

vocabulary.example: I am interested in technology and e-commerce.
vocabulary.extra: Are you interested in learning a new language?
vocabulary.extraTr: Yeni bir dil öğrenmeye ilgin var mı?

vocabulary.example: He is angry because he is late.
vocabulary.extra: Don't be angry, it's okay.

vocabulary.example: She is scared of dogs.
vocabulary.extra: I'm not scared of the dark.

vocabulary.example: I am excited about the trip!
vocabulary.extra: The kids are excited for the party.

vocabulary.example: I am nervous about the exam.
vocabulary.extra: Don't be nervous, you'll be fine.

vocabulary.example: She is beautiful.
vocabulary.extra: Istanbul is a beautiful city.

vocabulary.example: He is very smart.
vocabulary.extra: She is a smart student.

vocabulary.example: He is strong and healthy.
vocabulary.extra: Our team is very strong.

vocabulary.example: I feel weak today.
vocabulary.extra: The signal is very weak here.

vocabulary.example: He is a taxi driver.
vocabulary.extra: The drivers are busy today.

vocabulary.example: She is the office manager.
vocabulary.extra: I want to be a manager one day.

grammar.title: Verb 'Be' - Positive, Negative & Questions
grammar.titleTr: 'Be' Fiili - Olumlu, Olumsuz ve Soru Cümleleri
grammar.explanation: The verb 'be' has three forms: am, is, are. For negative, add 'not' after the verb. For questions, move the verb before the subject. Short answers use Yes/No + pronoun + be.
grammar.explanationTr: 'Be' fiilinin üç hali var: am, is, are. Olumsuz yapmak için fiilden sonra 'not' eklenir. Soru yapmak için fiil öznenin önüne geçer. Kısa cevaplarda Yes/No + zamir + be kullanılır.
table: Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Yes, he is. / No, he isn't.
Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.
Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
Yes, we are. / No, we aren't.
Yes, they are. / No, they aren't.

tips.en: is not = isn't, are not = aren't
tips.tr: Kısaltma: is not → isn't, are not → aren't

tips.en: am not = I'm not (there is NO 'amn't'!)
tips.tr: 'am not' kısaltması: I'm not (amn't diye bir şey YOK!)

tips.en: Short answer: Yes, I am. (never 'Yes, I'm')
tips.tr: Kısa cevap: Yes, I am. (asla 'Yes, I'm' olmaz!)

tips.en: a/an before jobs: She is A teacher, He is AN engineer
tips.tr: Meslek önünde a/an: She is a teacher, He is an engineer

reading.text:
Hello! I'm Mehmet. I'm 28 years old and I'm from Ankara. I'm not a student anymore — I'm a logistics manager at a shipping company.

My job is interesting but sometimes it is very busy. I'm responsible for 50 trucks and 30 drivers. When a delivery is late, my phone is always ringing!

My colleague Elif is an engineer. She isn't in the office today because she is sick. I hope she is better tomorrow.

My boss, Mr. Yılmaz, is strict but fair. He isn't unfriendly — he is just very focused on work. The company isn't big, but we are a good team.

After work, I'm usually tired. But I'm not too tired for English class! I'm excited because good English is important for international logistics. Many of our clients are from Europe and America.

Are you ready to learn English too? It isn't easy, but it is definitely worth it!
reading.textTr:
Merhaba! Ben Mehmet. 28 yaşındayım ve Ankaralıyım. Artık öğrenci değilim — bir kargo şirketinde lojistik müdürüyüm.

İşim ilginç ama bazen çok yoğun. 50 tır ve 30 şoförden sorumluyum. Bir teslimat geciktiğinde telefonum hep çalıyor!

Meslektaşım Elif bir mühendis. Bugün ofiste değil çünkü hasta. Umarım yarın daha iyi olur.

Patronum Bay Yılmaz sert ama adil. Soğuk değil — sadece işe çok odaklanmış. Şirket büyük değil ama iyi bir ekibiz.

İşten sonra genelde yorgunum. Ama İngilizce dersi için fazla yorgun değilim! Heyecanlıyım çünkü iyi İngilizce uluslararası lojistik için önemli. Müşterilerimizin çoğu Avrupa ve Amerika'dan.

Sen de İngilizce öğrenmeye hazır mısın? Kolay değil ama kesinlikle buna değer!

questions.question: Why isn't Elif in the office?
Is Mr. Yılmaz unfriendly?
options: No, he isn't — he is just focused
Yes, everyone is afraid of him

questions.question: Why is English important for Mehmet?
Is the company big?
options: No, but they are a good team

fillBlanks.sentence: I ___ a student at Istanbul University.
They ___ tired after the long meeting.
He ___ an engineer at a tech company.
We ___ not late. We are early!
Don't be ___. The exam is easy.

multipleChoice.question: "Is she a doctor?" → Hayır. Doğru kısa cevap?

sentenceOrder.correct: I am not scared of dogs

translation.english: I am thirsty. Can I have some water?
acceptAlso: I'm thirsty. Can I have some water
I'm thirsty can I have some water

translation.english: I am nervous about the exam.

dialog.title: First Day at the Office
dialog.context: Eyüp yeni bir şirkette işe başlıyor. Müdürü onu ekiple tanıştırıyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning, Eyüp! Welcome to our company. Are you ready for your first day?
lines.textTr: Günaydın Eyüp! Şirketimize hoş geldiniz. İlk gününüze hazır mısınız?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Good morning! Yes, I am very excited!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great! Let me introduce you to the team. This is Zeynep. She is our designer.
lines.textTr: Harika! Sizi ekiple tanıştırayım. Bu Zeynep. O bizim tasarımcımız.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hi Zeynep! Nice to meet you!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Nice to meet you too! Are you the new logistics guy?
lines.textTr: Ben de memnun oldum! Sen yeni lojistik elemanı mısın?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, I am! I'm responsible for shipping and delivery.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: And this is Ali. He is our developer. He isn't very talkative, but he is a genius with code!
lines.textTr: Ve bu Ali. O bizim yazılımcımız. Çok konuşkan değil ama kodda dahi!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hi Ali! I'm Eyüp. I'm not a tech person, but I'm interested in learning!
lines.textTr: Selam Ali! Ben Eyüp. Teknik biri değilim ama öğrenmeye meraklıyım!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: The office isn't big, but we are a strong team. Your desk is over there. Are you hungry? There is coffee and snacks in the kitchen.
lines.textTr: Ofis büyük değil ama güçlü bir ekibiz. Masanız şurada. Aç mısınız? Mutfakta kahve ve atıştırmalık var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I'm not hungry but I'm a little thirsty. Coffee sounds great! Thank you, everyone. I'm happy to be here!
lines.textTr: Aç değilim ama biraz susamışım. Kahve harika olur! Herkese teşekkürler. Burada olmaktan mutluyum!

questions.question: Is Ali talkative?
options: No, he isn't, but he's a genius

questions.question: Is the office big?
options: No, but the team is strong
No, and the team is small
